source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-156 Test Reports/Certificate of Accreditation/20230417_KT122_SGS_Korea_Co.,_Ltd._Dongtan_Laboratory_PM_Eng.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Accreditation scope excerpt No. KT122 lists electrical testing capabilities for batteries, software functional safety, and environmental/reliability tests.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as evidence that the accredited scope includes specified test methods, materials/products, standard designations, test ranges, and whether field testing is listed.
keyPoints: Electrical materials and components testing includes IEC, KC, and KS C IEC battery standards for secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications.
Software testing scope includes IEC 61508 functional safety parts 1 to 3, ISO 26262 road vehicle functional safety parts 2 to 9, and MISRA C guidelines.

Environmental and reliability testing scope includes IEC 60068 environmental tests, IEC 60529 IP Code, railway, marine, military, aerospace, telecom seismic, and ballast water management test methods.
The excerpt repeatedly identifies the accreditation number as No. KT122 and shows pages 2/38 through 38/38.

evidence.claim: The document excerpt is associated with accreditation number No. KT122.
The electrical materials and components scope includes IEC 61960-3:2017 for secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61960-3:2017 Electrical materials and components Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes - Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications

evidence.claim: The scope includes IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 CSV for safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 CSV Electrical materials and components Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes - Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable applications - Part 2: Lithium systems

evidence.claim: The scope includes KC 62133-2:2020 for lithium systems safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries.
evidence.evidenceText: KC 62133-2:2020 Electrical materials and components KC 62133-2:2020-07 Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolyte - Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable application – Part2 : Lithium systems

evidence.claim: The scope includes UN Manual of Tests and Criteria section 38.3 for lithium metal and lithium ion batteries.
evidence.evidenceText: ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.7 Electrical materials and components Manual of Tests and Criteria : 38.3 Lithium metal and lithium ion batteries
evidence.pageTarget: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Section 38.3

evidence.claim: MOTIE Notice No.2022-221 is listed for a safety confirmation standard covering electric toys with secondary cells and batteries.
evidence.evidenceText: MOTIE Notice No.2022-221(12.14. 2022.) Electrical materials and components Inclosure3>Safety confirmation standard - Annex 6 Appendix A Electric Toys A.3 Safety requirements for secondary cells and batteries A.4 Toy test method including a secondary cell or a battery

evidence.claim: The software scope includes IEC 61508 parts 1, 2, and 3 for functional safety of electrical/electronic/programmable electronic safety-related systems.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61508-1:2010 Software Functional safety of electrical/electronic/programmable electronic safety-related systems - Part 1 : General requirements; IEC 61508-2:2010 Software Functional safety of electrical/electronic/programmable electronic safety-related systems - Part 2 : Requirements; IEC 61508-3:2010 Software Functional safety of electrical/electronic/programmable electronic safety-related systems - Part 3 : software requirements

evidence.claim: The software scope includes ISO 26262 road vehicle functional safety parts 2 through 9.
evidence.evidenceText: ISO 26262-2:2018 Software Road vehicles - Functional safety - Part 2 : Management of functional safety ... ISO 26262-9:2018 Software Road vehicles - Functional safety - Part 9 : Automotive safety integrity level(ASIL)-oriented and safety-oriented analyses

evidence.claim: The scope includes MISRA C guidelines for use of the C language in critical systems.
evidence.evidenceText: MISRA C:2012 Software Guidelines for the use of the C language in critical systems C language; MISRA-C:2004 Software Guidelines for the use of the C language in critical systems C language

evidence.claim: The environmental and reliability scope includes IEC 60068 environmental testing methods including cold, dry heat, damp heat, shock, vibration, and temperature change tests.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60068-2-1:2007 Environmental testing Part 2-1: Tests - Test A: Cold; IEC 60068-2-2:2007 Environmental testing - Part 2-2: Tests - Tests B: Dry heat; IEC 60068-2-27:2008 Environmental testing - Part 2-27: Tests - Test Ea and guidance: Shock; IEC 60068-2-6:2007 Environmental testing - Part 2-6: Tests - Test Fc: Vibration

evidence.claim: The scope includes IEC 60529 for degrees of protection provided by enclosures, IP Code.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013 Electrical machinery for industries Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) Dustproof : IP1X ~ IP6X, Watertightness test IPX1 ~ IPX8

evidence.claim: The scope includes RRA notifications for seismic test methods for telecommunication facilities.
evidence.evidenceText: RRA Notification No.2020-92(11.17.2020.) Electrical machinery for industries Seismic Test Method for Telecommunication Facilities; RRA Notification No.2022-7(02.15.2022.) Electrical machinery for industries Seismic Test Method for Telecommunication Facilities
evidence.pageTarget: Seismic Test Method for Telecommunication Facilities

evidence.claim: The scope includes MOF Notice No.2019-159 for ballast water management system environmental test criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: MOF Notice No.2019-159 (10.08.2019.) Electrical machinery for industries Standard for Ballast Water Management [Appendix 6] Environmental test criteria for Ballast Water Management System 2. Environmental Test

reviewFlags.reason: The source text excerpt does not show the accreditation body, issuer, laboratory name, formal certificate title, official document date, or revision/version; title and document type are inferred from source metadata/path and visible accreditation number.

Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: metadata says MFDS/domestic, but the text lists multiple authorities and standards bodies including MOTIE, RRA, MOF, IEC, ISO, UN, and military/aerospace standards.
No product model is stated in the source text; productSignal appears only in metadata and was not treated as a document product model.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings such as Mechnical, Concpet, Approcal, Inclosure, insrallation, and Secrion.
